title: Fines Paid
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Amount), 0) AS total FROM PayFines WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Faction AS label, COALESCE(SUM(Amount), 0) AS value FROM PayFines WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Faction ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} Cr paid in minor fines during the report period. Fines are the slap-on-the-wrist end of the justice system — a high fines chart suggests aggressive flying, careless docking violations, or persistent scanning of ships that didn't appreciate the attention.
details.help: PayFines Amount tracks fine clearance payments. total drives the title as the total fine expenditure.

tagLines: Fine payment records compiled. Minor criminal penalty expenditure noted in the security log.
Small crimes, small fines. The accumulation is what adds up. This is what obstinance cost you.
Fines are the galaxy's way of charging you for not paying attention. You paid the bill.
